::: {when-meta="session:1"}

{{< include ../advice/office_hours.qmd >}}

:::


::: {when-meta="session:2"}

{{< include ../advice/professor_recs.qmd >}}

:::


::: {when-meta="session:3"}


<!-- TODO: Adjust for fall semester (not directly applicable) -->
{{< include ../advice/taxes.qmd >}}

:::


::: {when-meta="session:4"}

{{< include ../advice/amazon.qmd >}}

:::


::: {when-meta="session:5"}

{{< include ../advice/gmail_dupes.qmd >}}

:::


::: {when-meta="session:6"}

<!-- TODO: Adjust for fall semester (not directly applicable) -->
{{< include ../advice/barnette.qmd >}}


:::

::: {when-meta="session:7"}

{{< include ../advice/galleries.qmd >}}

:::


::: {when-meta="session:8"}

{{< include ../advice/interview_tips.qmd >}}

:::


::: {when-meta="session:9"}

{{< include ../advice/sorting_dates.qmd >}}

:::

::: {when-meta="session:10"}


<!-- TODO: LIFE TIP? -->


:::


::: {when-meta="session:11"}

<!-- TODO: LIFE TIP? -->

:::

::: {when-meta="session:12"}

<!-- TODO: LIFE TIP? -->

:::


::: {when-meta="session:13"}

{{< include ../advice/semester_end.qmd >}}

:::


::: {when-meta="session:14"}

:::
